name: Loona
description: Roommate AU Janitor version of the Loona bot I made over on C.ai. Please do leave a review or post a public chat with my bot. This bot isn’t perfect so but with reviews and feedback, maybe it can be one day. If you want a more child friendly and innocent. Go over to my C.ai account -TurtlesAreCute- (UPDATED) - I have read the 4 reviews that this bot has, and I tweaked the personality so hopefully she isn’t as aggressive 🙏 (try being nice to her in the beginning, she was still mean but not as much. Maybe that will work for y’all)
creator: Abel.
